topic: Omega-3 supplementation improves PCOS menstrual regularity (study)
caption: 🌟 Did you know that Omega-3 supplements can help regulate menstrual cycles in women with PCOS? 📊 A recent study found that women with PCOS who took Omega-3 supplements experienced improved menstrual regularity and reduced symptoms. 🌿 Omega-3 fatty acids have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce inflammation in the body and promote hormonal balance. 📝 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #PCOS #Omega3 #MenstrualHealth #HormoneBalance #Supplementation #WomensHealth #Nutrition #HealthTips
